Notes: 11 UWO players scored, including Osterman who had 15 points (11 in third
period) and Rueth and Silloway who had 12 each...UWO scored first eight points
and built a 16-4 lead...UWO's biggest lead was 27 points (three times), with
the latest being 76-49...UWP defeated UWO 74-68 on Feb. 3.
Game.Officials: Darla Brendemuehl, Michael Steidl, Ron Quirk
